settings.title: Settings
settings.matchSoundsDescription: Crowd reactions, kick effects, and whistles

settings.deleteAccountDescription: Disable this account and start the 30-day deletion window
settings.deleteAccountModalDescription: Your account will be disabled immediately, hidden from public surfaces, and signed out. You will not be able to sign in or create a new account with the same Facebook, Google, email, or phone for 30 days while deletion is pending. Contact support during that time to restore it. After 30 days, personal data is removed and those credentials can be used again.
settings.resetTrainingSuccess: Training match reset. You'll see the offer next time you click Ranked.
settings.addOrChangePhoneDescription: Link a Georgian mobile number for SMS sign-in
settings.changePhoneModalDescription: Link a Georgian mobile number to this account. Use Settings after Google or email sign-in so it stays one account.
settings.changePhoneOtpDescription: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to {phone}.
settings.phoneLinkSuccess: Phone number linked. You can now sign in with this number.
settings.phoneLinkFailed: Couldn't update your phone number. Please try again.

settings.phoneLinkedElsewhere: This phone number is already linked to another account.
settings.phoneOtpFailed: That code didn't work. Check it and try again.
settings.addOrChangePasswordDescription: Set a password so you can sign in with email
settings.changePasswordModalDescription: Enter a new password for your account. If you signed up with Google, this adds a password to the same account.
settings.changePasswordSuccess: Password updated. You can now sign in with email and password.
settings.changePasswordFailed: Couldn't update your password. Please try again.

welcome.heroTitle: Every question is a goal chance.
welcome.phraseBack: Turn your football brain into goals.
welcome.phraseBeat: Outsmart the rival. Top the table.
welcome.phraseTakeOn: Back your ball knowledge. Win the rank.
welcome.phrasePlay: Prove you're more than a plastic fan.
welcome.phraseFromTrivia: Injury time answers. Clean sheet wins.
welcome.phraseKnow: Climb the pyramid. Claim the crown.
welcome.phraseEveryRight: Dominate the pitch, one answer at a time.
welcome.categoriesSubtitle: {count} tactical categories, from UCL nights to cult icons.
welcome.tierRoadSubtitle: Begin at Academy and work your way to GOAT.
welcome.leaderboardSubtitle: Join the table, earn rank points, and chase the top spots.
welcome.footerLegal: QuizBall is an independent football trivia game. Club, league, tournament, and player references are used for editorial identification only. QuizBall is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any club, league, federation, or competition organizer.
welcome.allCategoriesDescription: Explore the full QuizBall category list.
welcome.loginDescription: Save progress, rank up, and play online with your account.
welcome.authOr: or
welcome.otpSentHint: If this number is linked to a QuizBall account, we sent a 6-digit code — check your messages.
